items.title: Van Hooijdonk verlaat NAC Breda en vertrekt naar Portugal
items.summary: Sydney van Hooijdonk vertrekt per direct bij NAC Breda. Zoals VI eerder al meldde maakt de aanvaller transfervrij de overstap naar het Portugese Estrela Amadora. De ploeg staat momenteel op de dertiende plaats in de Liga Portugal.

items.title: Rondje Europa: PSV en Ajax zijn klaar in de Champions League
items.summary: Woensdagavond werd pijnlijk duidelijk dat PSV en Ajax na hun nederlagen tegen respectievelijk Bayern München en Olympiakos klaar zijn in Europa, wat betekent dat er geen Nederlandse ploegen in de knock-outfase van het miljardenbal actief zullen zijn. In VI's Rondje Europa blikken we donderdagochtend uitgebreid terug op deze decepties.

items.title: Grim ontvangt complimenten uit Griekenland: 'Ajax weer gezond gemaakt'
items.summary: In Griekenland zijn ze trots op de overwinning van Olympiakos op Ajax . De Amsterdammers kennen niet het meest succesvolle seizoen in het miljardenbal, maar toch is het respect voor Ajax én Fred Grim groot vanuit Zuid-Europa.

items.title: 'That's not a yes or no' - Serena Williams remains open minded about return to tennis
items.summary: Serena Williams has refused to rule out making a shock return to tennis.

items.title: Football transfer rumours: Rafael Leão or Iliman Ndiaye to Manchester United?
items.summary: Today’s rumours embrace chaos There is plenty of plotting to be done at Old Trafford and they are keen to bring in some young talent. One man on the Manchester United shortlist is Chelsea’s 19-year-old Tyrique George, who has become something of a fringe figure at Stamford Bridge in recent times. Other options for the recruitment bods are Milan’s Rafael Leão and Everton’s Iliman Ndiaye. Randal Kolo Muani scored in Tottenham’s win over Eintracht Frankfurt on Wednesday night but his future looks uncertain. That was his only his third goal for the club in an underwhelming loan. Juventus are in search of a striker and could bring him back to Turin for a second spell. Another option for i bianconeri is Manchester United’s Joshua Zirkzee, who does not look as if he will be prolific in the Premier League and is available this month. Continue reading...

items.title: O’Neill aims for ‘renewed enthusiasm’ as Celtic seek Europa League relief
items.summary: In a tumultuous campaign and three-way Scottish title fight, the 73-year-old manager still has ambitions on the European stage Martin O’Neill’s involvement in celebrated European moments in Celtic’s history means he is entitled to bridle at the belief that domain is no longer a priority. O’Neill used pre-match media duties for the Europa League visit of Utrecht on Thursday to point towards what has the potential to be an uplifting few days for the Scottish champions. “We got a result in Feyenoord and fought our guts out in Bologna,” he said. “We don’t now want to just throw it away. We want to try and go for it if we can. We could still lose the game. We might not win the match and we might go out of the competition, but we want to give it a go. Continue reading...

items.title: Australian Open semi-finals LIVE! Sabalenka vs Svitolina and Pegula vs Rybakina
Slot tempert transferpaniek na blessure Frimpong: 'Eerst afwachten'
items.summary: Liverpool veegde woensdag de vloer aan met Qarabag, maar het was niet alleen maar hosanna op Anfield. Door de blessure van Jeremie Frimpong moeten The Reds mogelijk de transfermarkt op. 'Het hangt af van welke spelers beschikbaar zijn, of ze ons kunnen helpen en of we ze kunnen betalen.'

items.title: Van Hooijdonk wordt snel gepresenteerd in Portugal
items.summary: De winterse transfermarkt is geopend. In dit blog vind je alle speculaties en bevestigde transfers in Nederland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland.

items.title: Can injury-hit England ride momentum to Grand Slam?
items.summary: England enter 2026 with expectations high and opportunities aplenty to maintain their upward trajectory under Steve Borthwick.

items.title: Madrid, PSG drop to UCL playoffs in chaotic finale...
items.summary: Real Madrid were stunningly dumped into the qualifying playoffs of the Champions League by former coach Jose Mourinho on Wednesday and will be joined there by Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: Mourinho admits confusion before Benfica GK goal
items.summary: José Mourinho hailed his Benfica team after a 4-2 win over Real Madrid kept them in the Champions League, while admitting that confusion over the goal difference needed to progress almost saw them eliminated.

items.title: Mbappé slams Madrid loss: We didn't show desire
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé slammed Real Madrid's attitude and inconsistency, saying the team aren't playing like "a team of champions" after a 4-2 defeat at Benfica saw them miss out on the Champions League top eight.

items.title: Pep admits City UCL panic over Mourinho strategy
items.summary: Pep Guardiola revealed Manchester City were panicking over their Champions League hopes as Benfica pushed for a late goal against Real Madrid.

items.title: Champions League talking points: Mourinho's master...
items.summary: With all 36 Champions League teams in action simultaneously, Matchday 8 of the league phase delivered plenty of drama to cap a fun competition so far. ESPN FC's writers pick out their highs and lows of the tournament to this point.

items.title: Trubin's 'miracle' - how Mourinho's Benfica stunned Real Madrid
items.summary: Goalkeeper Anatoly Trubin's header gives Jose Mourinho an unforgettable moment as Benfica beat Real Madrid to stay alive in the Champions League.

items.title: Rosenior comes out on top as Conte's European woes continue
items.summary: Antonio Conte lifted the Champions League as a player in 1995-96 but has experienced nothing but despair as a manager in the competition.

items.title: Why have English teams dominated as Real & PSG face play-offs?
items.summary: Five of the eight teams to qualify automatically for the Champions League were from the Premier League, so why have they been so dominant?

items.title: ‘A great marker’: Rosenior lauds young Chelsea side for comeback win at Napoli
items.summary: Chelsea get first Champions League away win since 2022 Head coach praises Cole Palmer for ‘magnificent’ showing Liam Rosenior praised his young Chelsea side’s ability to deal with adversity after they produced a spirited comeback against Napoli to reach the last 16 of the Champions League. An excellent double from João Pedro and a devastating cameo from Cole Palmer ensured Rosenior’s side secured a 3-2 win at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona and avoided the inconvenience of having to go through next month’s two-legged playoff for a place in the knockout phase. Continue reading...

items.title: Champions League: Benfica keeper’s last-gasp header sends side into playoffs
items.summary: Anatoliy Trubin scores dramatic goal against Real Madrid Barça and Sporting in last 16, Bodø/Glimt make playoffs Goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin scored a 98th-minute header as Benfica defeated Real Madrid 4-2 to secure a Champions League knockout place on Wednesday and deny their opponents an automatic spot in the last 16. Benfica were heading out despite leading 3-2 with seconds of stoppage time remaining before Trubin met a free-kick to score the goal they needed to get into the playoff round on goal difference. Continue reading...
